visual_description: A man in a patterned shirt eats from a bowl with chopsticks while another man in a dark jacket smiles at him in a dimly lit indoor setting. The scene then cuts to a nighttime view of a car with bright headlights approaching on a wet road lined with streetlights and trees.
audio_description: Faint sounds of chewing and conversation are audible, followed by the low rumble of a car engine and tires on wet pavement.
